person.name: Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney

nameForms.fullText: Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney

popularStory.headline: Egidia Douglas
popularStory.description: Maternal granddaughter of King Robert II of Scotland and great granddaughter of King Robert I the Bruce of Scotland. Was beautiful and known as the Fair Maiden of Nithsdale.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney於1387年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale17歲，母親Egidia Stewart32歲。她於1407年11月17日與Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1438年之後在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯，埋葬在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney于1387年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale17岁，母亲Egidia Stewart32岁。她于1407年11月17日与Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1438年之后在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯，埋葬在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form (respelled) of   Gillian  , also used as a given name in its own right. It was already used as a prototypical girl's name in the phrase ‘Jack and Jill’ in the 15th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney was born in 1387, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale, was 17 and her mother, Egidia Stewart, was 32. She married Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney on 17 November 1407, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1438, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, and was buried in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney est née en 1387, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Egidia Stewart, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney le 17 novembre 1407, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1438, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney 1387 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale 17 und ihre Mutter Egidia Stewart 32. Sie hat am 17. November 1407 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1438 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland und wurde in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney è nata il nel 1387 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Egidia Stewart, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney il 17 novembre 1407, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1438, nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkneyが1387年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdaleは17歳，母Egidia Stewartは32歳であった。1407年11月17日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでHenry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1438年以後にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで死去し，スコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney(이)가 1387년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Stewart(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1407년 11월 17일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1438년 이후 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney nasceu em 1387, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Stewart, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney em 17 de novembro de 1407, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1438, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney родилась в 1387 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Stewart, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney 17 ноября 1407 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1438 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney nació en 1387, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Douglas Lord Nithsdale, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Egidia Stewart, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney el 17 de noviembre de 1407, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1438, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, y fue sepultada en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.
